prompt: Give me a short pep talk before I start a hard task I have been putting off all morning.
response:
Alright, it's time to channel your inner champion! You've got this! Today is the day to conquer that task that's been looming over you. Remember, the hardest part is often just starting, and you've already overcome that hurdle by deciding to begin. 

Take a deep breath, roll up your sleeves, and tackle it step by step. Break it into smaller, manageable pieces if you need to, and focus on one at a time. You have the skills, determination, and courage to handle this. Trust in your abilities and push through. Remember, growth and accomplishment come from stepping out of your comfort zone. You're capable of amazing things, and you’ve got all the power you need right now to turn this task into a victory. Go out there and smash it!
